html:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Year of the Dragonfly
See also: Floating Platform

The Dragonfly Boat is a structure exclusive to Don't Starve Together. Besides its size is smaller than a Boat, its function is exactly the same. It also has 200 like Boats. It takes damage by colliding with Sea Stacks, Salt Formations, coasts, or the border of the world. Taking damage can create a Leak on the boat that does constant damage (-0.5 /s per small leak and -1 /s per large leak) until a Boat Patch, Kelp Patch, Trusty Tape or Tree Jam is used on the leak. When reaches 0, it will not drop anything.

Given that it is smaller, only 4 of the Bumpers can be placed around the edge of the Dragonfly Boat, and they will prevent the collision from all angles like 8 bumpers on a Boat.

Repair

When damaged, the Boat can be repaired by the following materials. Tree Jam, Kelp Patch and Trusty Tape can only be used on Leaks.

Item Repair Value
Boat Patch 25 (repair leak)
Boards 50
Living Log 37.5
Twigs 13
Log, Driftwood Piece 12.5
Tree Jam 20 (repair leak)
Kelp Patch 0 (repair leak temporarily: small leak - 6 minutes, large leak - 4 minutes)
Trusty Tape 0 (repair leak)

Dragonfly Boat Kit

The Dragonfly Boat Kit is a craftable Item, exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It creates a Dragonfly Boat when placed on the Ocean.

Gallery

  • Map icon

“I'd better stop dragon my feet and build it.”
–Wilson, when examining a Dragonfly Boat Kit
“Who wants to build this thing? Anyone?”
–Willow, when examining a Dragonfly Boat Kit
“Wolfgang will make pretty boat!”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Dragonfly Boat Kit
“I can help set this up, I guess.”
–Wendy, when examining a Dragonfly Boat Kit
“UGH. ANOTHER HORRIBLE BOAT”
–WX-78, when examining a Dragonfly Boat Kit
“It would make sense to construct this near the water.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Dragonfly Boat Kit
“Fancy a sail, Lucy?”
–Woodie, when examining a Dragonfly Boat Kit
“I'm not the roll-up-your-sleeves type. Ask the handywoman.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Dragonfly Boat Kit
“Let us construct the most formidable vessel these cursed waters have ever touched.”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Dragonfly Boat Kit
“We can help build it!”
–Webber, when examining a Dragonfly Boat Kit
“Just like a gravy boat, minus the gravy.”
–Warly, when examining a Dragonfly Boat Kit
“Fancy Floaty!”
–Wormwood, when examining a Dragonfly Boat Kit
“It's not gonna build itself.”
–Winona, when examining a Dragonfly Boat Kit
“Whereabouts to set this boat afloat?”
–Wortox, when examining a Dragonfly Boat Kit
“Gonna be best boat. Because it mine!”
–Wurt, when examining a Dragonfly Boat Kit
“Stand back everyone, this looks like a job for a Pinetree Pioneer.”
–Walter, when examining a Dragonfly Boat Kit
“Time is wasting. We'd better get to it.”
–Wanda, when examining a Dragonfly Boat Kit
The Dragonfly Boat Kit is a craftable Item, exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It creates a Dragonfly Boat when placed on the Ocean.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Thuyền Chuồn Chuồn là một cấu trúc độc quyền của Don't Starve Together. Ngoài kích thước nhỏ hơn Thuyền, chức năng của nó hoàn toàn giống nhau. Nó cũng có 200 chiếc thuyền tương tự. Nó nhận sát thương khi va chạm với các bãi biển, bãi muối, bờ biển hoặc biên giới thế giới. Việc nhận sát thương có thể tạo ra Rò rỉ trên thuyền và gây sát thương liên tục (-0,5 /s đối với rò rỉ nhỏ và -1 /s đối với rò rỉ lớn) cho đến khi Miếng vá Thuyền, Miếng dán Tảo bẹ, Băng Trusty hoặc Kẹt cây được sử dụng trên chỗ rò rỉ. Khi về 0, nó sẽ không bỏ bất cứ thứ gì.
